A 24-year-old man voluntarily suppresses the urge to defecate while attending a long examination. Several hours later, the urge disappears temporarily. Which physiological event is most responsible for postponement of defecation?

questions.question: Completion of defecation requires:
options: Voluntary relaxation of external anal sphincter
